title: Possibility of a Non‐Amino Acid Pathway in the Biosynthesis of Marine‐Derived Oxazoles.
author_string: Ichino, Takao, Arimoto, Hirokazu, Uemura, Daisuke
abstract: AbstractChemInform is a weekly Abstracting Service, delivering concise information at a glance that was extracted from about 200 leading journals. To access a ChemInform Abstract, please click on HTML or PDF.
